steps.assistant_text: 5-call wrapper with same a0, varying a1 from caller args (a1, a3, arg5, arg6, a2 — peculiar argument-shuffling order). After 5 calls, commits arg8/arg7 to a0[1]/a0[2]. K&R-declared callee gl_func_00000000 produces conservative arg spills that exactly match target. void return type — int return added an extra or v0,zero,zero.
